nasb.text: Elihoreph and Ahijah, the sons of Shisha were secretaries; Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud was the recorder;

esv.text: Elihoreph and Ahijah the sons of Shisha were secretaries; Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder;

cnv.text: 示沙的兩個兒子以利何烈和亞希亞作書記；亞希律的兒子約沙法作史官；

ccb.text: 示沙的儿子以利何烈和亚希亚做书记；亚希律的儿子约沙法做史官；
